title: rubus × flavinanus
intro: Rubus × flavinanus, a hybrid raspberry plant, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragaria species. The medicinal properties of Rubus × flavinanus are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × flavinanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. Rubus × flavinanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a flavoring agent in food products due to its sweet and slightly tart taste.
